summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ID Verification flow for AnyWork UK marketplace. All backend API tests pass (16/16). Frontend UI tests verified the complete flow: Helper uploads ID + selfie -> Admin reviews in dashboard -> Admin approves/rejects -> User status updates correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - should add aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/verification/submit requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/verification/submit with passport ID type (200)
Backend: GET /api/verification/status returns user verification status
Backend: GET /api/admin/verifications requires admin role (403 for non-admin)
Backend: GET /api/admin/verifications returns list with pending count
Backend: GET /api/admin/verifications/{id} returns detail with images
Backend: GET /api/admin/verifications/{id} returns 404 for non-existent
Backend: PUT /api/admin/verifications/{id} approves verification (verified status)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/verifications/{id} rejects verification with reason
Backend: PUT /api/admin/verifications/{id} handles rejection without reason
Backend: PUT /api/admin/verifications/{id} rejects invalid status (400)
Backend: Passport, Driving License, National ID types all work
Backend: Admin login works correctly
Frontend: /verify-identity page loads with 3-step wizard
Frontend: ID type selection (Passport, UK Driving Licence, National ID Card) works
Frontend: Upload ID front button [data-testid='upload-id-front'] present
Frontend: Upload ID back button [data-testid='upload-id-back'] present for driving license
Frontend: Upload selfie button [data-testid='upload-selfie'] present
Frontend: Continue buttons with data-testid present for each step
Frontend: Admin dashboard /admin/dashboard loads correctly
Frontend: Verifications tab with pending count badge [data-testid='tab-verifications']
Frontend: Verification cards display user name, email, ID type, submitted date
Frontend: Review buttons [data-testid='review-{id}'] open modal
Frontend: Modal shows applicant info, ID front, ID back, selfie images
Frontend: Approve button [data-testid='approve-verification-btn'] works
Frontend: Reject button [data-testid='reject-verification-btn'] works
Frontend: Rejection reason textarea available
Frontend: Approval updates verification to 'Verified' status (green badge)
Frontend: Rejection updates verification to 'Rejected' status (red badge)
Frontend: Success toast messages appear for approve/reject actions
Frontend: Pending count decrements after processing
action_items: Optional: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent in AdminDashboardPage.js for accessibility
seed_data_creation: Created test users with verification submissions (passport, driving_license, national_id types) during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: ID Verification flow is complete and working. Helper submits ID (passport/driving license/national ID) + selfie at /verify-identity. Admin reviews at /admin/dashboard Verifications tab, can approve (sets is_verified=true, verification_status='verified') or reject with reason. User gets notification and email (MOCKED). All data-testid attributes present for testing.

mocked_apis.email_service: MOCKED - Emails logged with '[EMAIL MOCKED]' prefix when RESEND_API_KEY not configured. Verification approval/rejection emails are mocked.

verification_submission_page.details: 3-step wizard: 1) Select ID type (passport/driving_license/national_id), 2) Upload ID front (+ back for non-passport), 3) Upload selfie and submit. Base64 images sent to API.

verification_submit_api.details: Accepts id_type, id_front (base64), id_back (optional base64), selfie (base64). Creates verification record with status='pending'. Updates user verification_status to 'pending'.

admin_verifications_list.details: Returns list of verifications with user info, pending_count. Admin-only (403 for non-admin).

admin_verification_detail.details: Returns full verification including base64 images for admin review.

admin_approve_verification.details: Updates verification status, user verification_status='verified', is_verified=true. Creates notification, sends email (mocked).

admin_reject_verification.details: Updates verification status with rejection_reason. User verification_status='rejected'. Creates notification.

admin_dashboard_verifications_tab.details: Shows pending count badge, verification cards with Review button. Modal shows applicant info, ID images, selfie, approve/reject buttons.
